answers: Endangered species are plants and animals at risk of extinction. Habitat loss, poaching, pollution, and climate change are the biggest threats to their survival.
Endangered species holo emon prani ba gachpal jar population onek kome geche ar era hariye jete pare. Tiger, panda, rhino — onek animal endangered.
The IUCN Red List tracks endangered species globally. Currently, over 40,000 species are threatened with extinction, including many mammals, birds, amphibians, and marine species.

Protecting endangered species is crucial because each species plays a role in its ecosystem. Conservation efforts include habitat protection, breeding programs, anti-poaching laws, and wildlife corridors.
